title: Quick Sort
description:
Implement **quick sort**. Given an array of numbers, return a new sorted array in ascending order.

Quick sort selects a pivot element, partitions the array into elements less than and greater than the pivot, then recursively sorts each partition.

**Example:**
```
nums = [3, 6, 8, 10, 1, 2, 1]
Result = [1, 1, 2, 3, 6, 8, 10]
```
hints: Pick a pivot element, then partition: smaller elements left, larger right.
Recursively sort the left and right partitions.
Concatenation approach: filter into less/equal/greater, recurse on less and greater.
